metadata.name: open_research
metadata.description: OpenResearch: project registry, bonding-curve project tokens, proposal ledger, verifier registry

accounts.name: miner_token_account
docs: Miner's token account, receives the returned stake.

accounts.name: reward_recipient_token_account
docs: Reward recipient's token account, receives the minted reward.

accounts.name: token_metadata
docs: the metadata program and this project mint.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Caller is not the authorized authority

errors.name: NotRegistered
errors.msg: Address is not a registered verifier

errors.name: NotVerifier
errors.msg: Caller is not an allowlisted verifier

errors.name: WrongStatus
errors.msg: Proposal is in the wrong status for this action

errors.name: WrongReviewer
errors.msg: Reviewer does not match the locked reviewer

errors.name: ExpiryNotReached
errors.msg: Expiry window has not been reached

errors.name: ScoreNotImproved
errors.msg: Verified score does not improve on the current best

errors.name: InsufficientPayment
errors.msg: Insufficient lamports for the requested buy

errors.name: PoolCapExceeded
errors.msg: Mint would exceed the miner pool cap

errors.name: InvalidCurve
errors.msg: Curve parameters are invalid (base_price + slope must be > 0)

errors.name: StringTooLong
errors.msg: Token name or symbol exceeds maximum length

fields.name: authority
docs: The admin who can manage the verifier allowlist. `Pubkey::default()` after `renounce`.

fields.name: next_project_id
docs: Counter for the next project id.

fields.name: next_proposal_id
docs: Counter for the next proposal id.

fields.name: verifier_count
docs: Cached verifier count for cheap reads.

types.name: SolVault
docs: A program-owned PDA whose only purpose is to hold lamports for the bonding-curve reserves.

types.name: VerifierEntry
docs: Marker PDA. Existence ⇒ this verifier is allowlisted.

constants.name: SLASH_BPS_TO_BURN
docs: Portion of slashed stake permanently burned.

constants.name: SLASH_BPS_TO_VERIFIER_POOL
docs: Portion of slashed stake transferred to the verifier-pool / cranker (claimable).
